strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and cloud platforms—exceeds 15-year requirement with demonstrated staff-level tenure across multiple organizations
Currently engaged in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP frameworks) at re:cinq, showing active alignment with AI technology focus
Founded and maintains GISCollective open-source platform, demonstrating entrepreneurial capability and ability to architect and sustain technical vision
concerns: 14 months in AI-focused role is insufficient to establish the 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms' the preferred qualifications seek
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, a stated preferred qualification for this AI strategy principal engineer role

Resume emphasizes technical execution and engineering across domains but lacks evidence of strategic advisory, customer-facing thought leadership, or industry-influence work required by key responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Active AI-agent infrastructure role (14 months tenure)
20+ years engineering experience across multiple platforms and companies
No advanced degree in AI; limited evidence of strategic advisory or thought leadership

response.justification: Bogdan brings solid seniority and technical breadth with 20+ years of engineering experience and recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure. However, 14 months in AI-focused work is still early in building the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products' the preferred qualifications require. The absence of an advanced degree in AI, combined with the resume's emphasis on technical execution rather than strategic advisory, customer engagement, or thought leadership, creates a gap against the director-level strategy and advisory expectations of this principal engineer role. He could develop into this position but appears earlier in the AI expertise arc than the role seeks.
